channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump Rejects Iran's Ceasefire Proposal, Congress Considers ICE Funding
item.description: The Trump administration deemed Iran's response to a U.S. peace proposal unacceptable. Meanwhile, Republicans in Congress are seeking ICE funding.

item.title: AI in China and Dementia's Financial Impact
Oregon gubernatorial candidate: A pencil with a point
item.description: An analysis reveals Oregon's public schools rank last in fourth-grade reading. A pencil is being used to highlight the issue.

item.title: Trump proposes suspension of federal gas tax as prices rise
item.description: Congressional action would be necessary to suspend the federal gas tax.
